channel.title: "Samsung Electronics OR SK hynix" - Google News

item.title: Helium stocks of South Korea's chipmakers to last until June, sources say - Reuters
item.description: Helium stocks of South Korea's chipmakers to last until June, sources say Reuters

item.title: Samsung, SK Hynix shares drop as high chip prices stoke end-demand doubts - KED Global
item.description: Samsung, SK Hynix shares drop as high chip prices stoke end-demand doubts KED Global
